text.title: Debt Scoring Output Contract
text.summary: Schema for a scored-debt-item object and the debt register. Must be satisfied before a scored list is published or fed into sprint planning.

field.name: code_or_design_pointer
field.notes: file path, design-system component id, or RFC link

field.name: what_changes_if_paid
field.notes: audience-language outcome; must reference user-impact concretely

field.name: anchor_doc_ref
field.notes: link to the committed anchor descriptions used for this scoring round

forbidden.pattern: score computed by different formula than (UI*CF*FR*BR)/FC
confidence = HIGH with confidence_evidence showing <5 factors data_backed
what_changes_if_paid contains only banned phrases ("improves quality", "reduces debt", "improves maintainability") without user/business outcome
anchor_doc_ref missing or points to an ad-hoc just-now-invented anchor
item ranked in top-3 of debt sprint with confidence = LOW
all five factors set to 3 (signal of unanchored scoring fatigue)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Recompute score automatically from factor values; reject hand-set scores that don't match the formula.
Auto-populate confidence_evidence.change_frequency.data_backed = true when git-log query returns ≥1 result for the item path.
Round score to 1 decimal place at presentation time; store full precision.

list.item: All five factor integers present in range 1..5
Confidence band assigned and matches evidence count
what_changes_if_paid is audience-language and references user-impact
No top-3 items with LOW confidence (or escalated for more data)
